methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the RDF normalization process.
\:param graph: an instance of rdflib.Graph containing the RDF data.
\:param max_run_time: optional maximum runtime in seconds for the normalization process.
@type graph: object

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.normalize
documentation: Main method to normalize the RDF graph using a deterministic algorithm.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.collect_blank_nodes
documentation: Collect blank nodes and map them to the triples (quads) that reference them.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.issue_canonical_ids
documentation: Assign deterministic IDs to blank nodes.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.hash_first_degree
documentation:
Compute the first-degree hash for a blank node based on its adjacent triples.
\:param blank_id: a blank node (BNode instance).
\:return: a string representing the SHA-256 hash.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.serialize_quad
documentation:
Serialize a quad into a deterministic string format.
Replace the blank node with a placeholder.
\:param quad: a triple (s, p, o).
\:param blank_id: the blank node being hashed.
\:return: a string serialization of the quad.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.serialize_normalized_graph
documentation:
Serialize the normalized graph into a canonical format (N-Quads or similar).
\:return: the normalized graph as a string.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.replace_blank_with_canonical
documentation:
Replace a blank node with its canonical identifier.
\:param term: a term in the graph.
\:return: the term with blank nodes replaced by canonical IDs.

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.RdfCanonicalization.check_runtime
documentation: Check if the maximum runtime has been exceeded.

classes.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.IdentifierIssuer

methods.name: graph_sign_and_verify_c4gai.rdf_canonicalization.IdentifierIssuer.get_id
documentation:
Get or assign a deterministic ID for the given blank node.
\:param blank_node: a BNode.
\:return: the deterministic identifier.
A class to manage deterministic issuance of identifiers for blank nodes.
